pricing.title: App pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your site
howTo.step1.title: Add the widget
howTo.step1.desc: Open the Wix Editor, add Pricing Plans Compare from Add Apps, and place it on your page.
howTo.step2.title: Create plan cards
howTo.step2.desc: In the Manage tab, add up to four plan cards with features, prices, and CTAs.
howTo.step3.title: Connect Wix Pricing Plans
howTo.step3.desc: Map each card CTA to a native Wix Pricing Plan for seamless checkout.
howTo.step4.title: Customize the design
howTo.step4.desc: Pick a theme, highlight color, and card style. Premium unlocks badges and advanced design.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do visitors purchase a plan?
faq.a1: When CTA mode is set to Wix Pricing Plan, clicking the button opens native Wix Pricing Plans checkout using your mapped plan ID.
faq.q2: Can I use custom links instead of checkout?
faq.a2: Yes. Set CTA mode to Custom URL or Contact us and enter the destination URL or contact page.
faq.q3: How many plans can I show on the free tier?
faq.a3: The free app plan includes up to three pricing cards. Upgrade for unlimited cards, badges, and advanced design.
faq.q4: What does the Highlighted card do?
faq.a4: One plan can be highlighted with a taller card, accent border, and larger CTA to draw attention.
faq.q5: Where do I edit the widget?
faq.a5: All content and design settings are managed in this dashboard. The editor panel only controls widget placement.

onboarding.slide3.desc: Add the widget to your site and let visitors purchase plans with one click.
